name: SQ-109
description: SQ-109 is an orally active, small molecule antibiotic for treatment of pulmonary TB. Currently in Phase I clinical trials, SQ-109 could replace one or more drugs in the current first-line TB drug regimen, simplify therapy, and shorten the TB treatment regimen.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in bacterial infection, infectious and parasitic disease (unspecified), and tuberculosis.
mechanismOfAction: With a mechanism of action distinct from other antibiotics used in TB therapy, SQ109 inhibits cell wall synthesis and acts on multiple cellular pathways in a select group of microorganisms.
